---
title: "migrant data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Visit

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

old_visits <- read.csv("data/visit_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

new_visits <- old_visits %>%
  mutate(
    hn = toupper(trimws(hn)),
    visit_date = trimws(visit_date),
    
    # convert dd/mm/yyyy → Date
    visit_date_parsed = as.Date(visit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  ) %>%
  
  # sort by patient + date
  arrange(hn, visit_date_parsed) %>%
  
  # assign visit number per patient
  group_by(hn) %>%
  mutate(
    visit_number = row_number(),
    
    # create visit_id
    visit_id = paste0(
      "V",
      format(visit_date_parsed, "%Y%m%d"),
      "_",
      hn,
      "_",
      visit_number
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # remove helper column
  select(-visit_date_parsed)

#new_visits$visit_id

new_visits <- new_visits %>%
  select(visit_id, everything())


new_visits_tidy <- new_visits %>%
  select(1:which(names(new_visits) == "precriptionadjust"))



# save file
write.csv(new_visits_tidy, "data/visits.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
